+function createTokenAccountSnapshot(cfg: { secretResolved?: boolean }) {

+    token: cfg.secretResolved ? "resolved-discord-token" : "",
+    tokenSource: "config",
+    tokenStatus: cfg.secretResolved ? "available" : "configured_unavailable",
+  };
+}
